title: chaetochloa scabrifolia
intro: Chaetochloa scabrifolia, also known as rough beard grass, is a type of grass native to tropical regions of the world. The medicinal properties of Chaetochloa scabrifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to support immune function. In herbal preparations, Chaetochloa scabrifolia is often made into a tea or infused oil, which can be applied topically to skin or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
